advisory_findings.summary: Clarify that helpers used only by validateFrontendAcceptanceRunArtifact stay in validation, while helpers used by two or more modules stay in core.
State explicitly that recording imports core helpers as well as validation.
Keep content and command architecture threshold constants in validation, because they are validation-only domain policy.
Add the P30 continuation reviewer-recovery and provider-health shards to the focused gate as defense-in-depth.

decision: No P0/P1 blockers. Fold advisory items into the P31 plan before implementation.
